> [!WARNING]
> This script is deprecated and no longer maintained. It targets older WorkFlowy behavior, so it may no longer work as expected. Install only if you’re comfortable troubleshooting breakages yourself.

# WorkFlowy - Inline Code Formatting [ARCHIVED] [![Install](https://img.shields.io/badge/Install-v2023.04.24-blue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/elstgav/workflowy/main/dist/scripts/archive/inline-code-style/workflowy.inline-code-style.user.js)

<sup>Gavin Elster | MIT license</sup>

Adds inline code formatting to WorkFlowy (e.g. `code`).

## Deprecated

[WorkFlowy has implemented a native code block feature](https://blog.workflowy.com/code-blocks-inline-code-quotes-strikethrough/), so this script is no
longer necessary! 🎉
